title: Mending HUD
description: Mod that calculates the durability you need to mend towards.
body:
# 📖 About this mod
Dynamically calculates a 'target durability' you need to mend towards based on the current amount of Experience bottles and your current durability of all your Armor pieces **when you hold Experience Bottles in your hand**. This mod displays the target durability next to the bottom right of your screen. **This is not 100% accurate.**

![Example ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sFfaSbB2/images/84c5551920cdaf127a4789e34e6379208a0b3b77.png)

# 🎀 Why download this mod?
The target durability the mods shows is of if you mend to for all your armor pieces, atleast 90% of your Experience Bottles will be used and ensures an even 'Mend'. This means it’s perfect for players who want to optimize their mending process, ensuring that every XP bottle counts and it not waste. **This is especially helpful when repairing your armor in PvP fights, and can completely change the game** in certain situations!

# ❓ Where do I report bugs and issues?
You can report bugs and issues [here](https://github.com/Juteplant1/Juteplant-Mend-Hud/issues)

# ⚠️ Heads up
**_This mod is not 100% accurate all the time_**
